copy.title: Catch and Read the Closeout
copy.prompt: The ball is coming. The defender is closing late.
copy.game_context: 4-on-4 half-court shell. Ball reverses from the slot to the wing. Your defender was helping in the paint and has to close out to you.
copy.possession_setup: You are the right wing. Your defender (x2) was helping one pass away in the paint. As the pass arrives he sprints out at you, still a step or two short of his cushion.
copy.decision_moment: The ball arrives at your hands. x2 is closing hard but is still short and decelerating.
copy.visible_cue: x2 is closing fast but has not yet closed the cushion. Hands are not yet up. Clean catch, clear sightline.
copy.best_read: Catch in shooting pocket and rise immediately. The closeout is short and under control — no contest at the catch, and any extra dribble lets him recover.
copy.explanation_md: **Advantage or Reset.** Your defender was helping when the pass left. He's running while you're catching — he can't beat the ball. If the closeout is short and under control, catch and shoot. If he's flying past you, drive. If he's set with no advantage, reset. Look at his feet and his cushion at the catch.

feedback.correct: Good read. The closeout was short. You caught and shot before he could contest.
feedback.partial: A drive can work against a flying closeout. This one was under control and short — the shot was open. Take it.
feedback.wrong: Look at the closeout. If the defender is short and under control at the catch, the shot is open. Catch and shoot.

self_review_checklist: Did I see the defender helping before the pass arrived?
Did I catch in my shooting pocket?
Did I read the cushion before I dribbled?
Did I shoot before his hands were up?
acceptable_reads: Rip and drive baseline if the defender is sprinting past — produces a layup or kickout, but loses the clean catch-and-shoot.
bad_reads: Pass back to the point — gives up the open look and resets the defense.
Hold and pump fake — the defender closes the cushion and contests.

shoot.label: Shoot it.
shoot.feedback_text: Best read. The defender was helping and is still a step short. You have a clean look — take the shot off the catch.

rip_and_drive.label: Rip and drive past him.
rip_and_drive.feedback_text: Okay. Driving works against a flying closeout, but this defender is decelerating under control. The shot was the cleaner read.
rip_and_drive.partial_feedback_text: A drive can work, but you gave up the open jumper. Read the defender — when the closeout is short, shoot.

pass_back.label: Pass it back to the point.
pass_back.feedback_text: Not yet. You had an open shot. Passing it back gives the defense time to set up.

pump_fake_hold.label: Hold the ball and pump fake.
pump_fake_hold.feedback_text: Not yet. The defender catches up while you hesitate. The shot was open at the catch.
